case_title: SANCHEZ, GUADALUPE vs. GOROSPE, ROMEL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, GUADALUPE AS TO DEFENDANT GOROSPE, ROMEL GOROSPE, MELCHOR DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-31-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-02-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-11-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-31-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-17-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-17-1995, CONTINUED TO MAY-01-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF SHALL GIVE NOTICE TO DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A STATUS CONF STATEMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-01-1995, CONTINUED TO MAY-31-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/ANSWER PRIOR TO 5/23/95. PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-31-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-31-1995, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-30-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
